title: corynostylis schlechteri
intro: Corynostylis schlechteri, also known as the African Stinging Nettle, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a shrub-like plant with stinging hairs that contain histamine, serotonin, and acetylcholine, which provide its medicinal properties. The plant is used to treat various health issues, including hypertension, fever, and rheumatism, due to its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation. Corynostylis schlechteri can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in traditional herbal remedies to take advantage of its health benefits.
